title: The Ark Begins to Move
description: The fight shifts toward the great golden bell, turning victory into a promise to prove that the City of Gold exists.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Luffy, Aisa, Wyper. The fight shifts toward the great golden bell, turning victory into a promise to prove that the City of Gold exists.

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: So was my son! Are they fine!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The militia members are all probably...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Do you know anything about them!?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Emel is... That sort of man.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: 6 years ago!? Then does that mean-

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Working to ensure nobody ever defined him...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: I have to get back to them!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: The pirates from the blue seas?

summary: The fight shifts toward the great golden bell, turning victory into a promise to prove that the City of Gold exists.
